title: rollandia ambigua
intro: Rollandia ambigua is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the "White Mountain Daisy." The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The Rollandia ambigua plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its potential medicinal properties.
